utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each one is fully detailed: the property section includes price, address, size, features, taxes, etc.; financing includes method, amount, and terms; legal_services includes cost and service details; moving_services has cost, type, and included services; setup_services covers both survey and utilities with costs and details; total_budget provides a complete cost breakdown with one-time and monthly costs and timeline. All required items are present and fully specified.
